host.label: Bind host
host.description: Address the server listens on. Use 0.0.0.0 inside Docker/Podman containers so port mappings work.

port.label: Port
port.description: Port for the Storybook dev server.

config_dir.label: Config directory
config_dir.description: Path to the Storybook config directory. Change for monorepos or non-standard setups.

framework.label: Framework
framework.description: UI framework. Controls which story format examples are shown.
